mapper.sql: id, config_key, config_value, config_name, status, remark, deleted, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_config WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey} AND deleted = 0

SELECT FROM sys_config
deleted = 0
AND (config_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR config_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_config (config_key, config_value, config_name, status, remark, deleted, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{configName}, #{status}, #{remark}, 0, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_config SET config_key = #{configKey}, config_value = #{configValue}, config_name = #{configName}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_config SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
